## 🐛 Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs here.

```
Paste logs here
```

|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22 |
